---

PERF HUNT — 2026-06-25 — EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

Baseline: wall p99 44.663 ms of 50 ms budget (noise σ 0.257 ms). Fattest phase: steering 13.6 ms (~30%). 5 ideas implemented, 0 KEEPs. Merge nothing.

| Idea | Scope | Phase | Verdict | Δwall p99 (ms) | Δphase (ms) |
|---|---|---|---|---:|---:|
| Movement: atan2-free turn-limit (dot/cross) | engine | movement | DEFER | -0.506 | -0.347 |
| Movement: kill powf(1.0) + quartic max_speed | engine | movement | DEFER | +0.703 | -0.272 |
| Bundle (kill-powf + atan2-free) | - | movement | DEFER (collapsed) | +0.143 | -0.296 |
| Shared-collect two-pass steer/integrate | architectural | steering | DITCH (triage) | +0.482 | -1.926 |
| Golden-Zone: giants ignore mice (size dominance) | biological | steering | DITCH (triage) | -0.125 | -0.050 |
| Native Bevy par_iter steering+movement | architectural | steering | ERROR (no build) | - | - |

MERGE SHORTLIST: Nothing clears the bank bar — recommend merging nothing this run. No candidate produced a wall-p99 win outside its noise floor at 1M.
- Closest: movement-atan2-free-turn-limit (only one with phase AND wall both negative; ships unit tests) — merge only inside a hand-merged movement-loop rewrite, after a determinism canary.
- movement-kill-powf, turn-rate-divide half only — bit-identical/zero-risk, fold opportunistically into that same rewrite; skip the max_speed half unless the canary clears it.

KEY FINDINGS: (1) The shared-collect ditch isolated the steering fork-join BARRIER (not the redundant 1M collect) as the real wall cost — load-bearing for the next steering attempt. (2) The two movement DEFERs are mutually exclusive as authored (both rewrite the same turn-limiter block + import line); the bundle could not stack. (3) The size-dominance Golden-Zone idea washed at the noise floor, reconfirming ledger #15.

HUNT NEXT: attack the steering fork-join barrier itself; hand-merge the two movement DEFERs into one loop and re-A/B; re-author the Bevy par_iter idea against the correct bevy_ecs 0.14.2 import path (BatchingStrategy is not at that path)."}</result>

PERF HUNT — RUN 2026-06-26 (1M creatures, 50ms budget; baseline wall p99 = 49.97ms, at the ceiling)

SCOREBOARD
| Idea | Scope | Phase | Verdict | Δwall p99 (ms) | Δphase (ms) |
|---|---|---|---|---:|---:|
| Native Bevy par_iter_mut — kill the 1M collect | architectural | steering | KEEP | -7.258 | -4.230 |
| Fuse behavior_transition into steering | architectural | steering | DITCH* | -2.576 | +1.284 |
| Lower steering Rayon min_len (256->64) | architectural | steering | DITCH(not reproduced) | -2.218 | -0.492 |
| Avoidance reaction-latency jitter | biological | steering | DITCH | -2.107 | +0.171 |
| Branchless octant — kill perception atan2 | engine | perception | DITCH(not reproduced) | -1.479 | -0.761 |
| BodySize powf->sqrt allometry | engine | steering | DITCH | -0.451 | -0.092 |

| max_accel from cached inv_sqrt | engine | steering | DITCH | +0.301 | +0.039 |

| Skip no-op accel cap for wanderers | engine | steering | DITCH | +1.011 | +0.574 |

* Fuse scored DITCH only because the phase-targeted tool folds the behavior phase into steering; by wall clock it is a real -2.576ms win. It is mutually exclusive with the KEEP (same barrier) — do not merge both.

MERGE SHORTLIST (merge-now)
1. Native Bevy par_iter_mut (kill the 1M collect) — -7.26ms wall p99, replicated -7.345ms. Bit-identical, behavior-preserving. Moves the live baseline ~49.97ms -> ~42.7ms, out of overrun. GATE: assert ComputeTaskPool thread count >1 (silent serial = catastrophic regression) and run the cells_queried determinism canary across all 5 seeds. Only merge-now item.

NO BUNDLE: single KEEP, nothing to stack. Two strongest architectural results (par_iter KEEP and the fuse) attack the same serial collect + fork-join barrier and are not additive — pick one (recommend par_iter; fuse is the fallback).

HUNT NEXT: re-measure the two not-reproduced candidates (min_len 256->64, branchless octant) on the post-par_iter tree; stop micro-optimizing steering arithmetic (proven memory/neighbor-cache-bound, not ALU-bound) and attack access pattern or biological work-skipping instead; re-profile after the KEEP lands (perception/grid_rebuild ~8.4ms become the new second targets).

---

**Perf-Hunt 2026-06-26 (Run 2) — Executive Summary**

Baseline: 46.78 ms wall p99 @ 1M / 5 seeds. Budget: 50 ms. Headroom: ~3.2 ms.
20 ideas measured. 0 standalone KEEPs. 1 bundle KEEP. 3 DEFERs. 16 DITCHes. 1 build error.

**Headline Table**

| Idea | Scope | Phase | Verdict | ΔWall p99 (ms) | ΔPhase (ms) |
|------|-------|-------|---------|---------------:|------------:|
| BUNDLE: defer-rotation + octant + hunger-gated | biological | steering | **KEEP** | **−1.81** | **−1.99** |
| Hunger-gated avoidance | biological | steering | DEFER | −4.33 | −2.15 |
| Defer rotation.radians | engine | movement | DEFER | −0.11 | −0.16 |
| Octant from cached radians | engine | perception | DEFER | +0.06 | −0.23 |
| Behavior throttle pre-filter | engine | behavior | DITCH† | −1.61 | −2.37 |
| HomePosition removal from SteeringQuery | engine | steering | DITCH† | −0.47 | −0.42 |
| Adjacent-cell early-exit K-closest | engine | perception | DITCH | +2.00 | +0.37 |
| Parallel entity-scratch fill (Bevy par_iter) | architectural | grid_rebuild | DITCH | +11.09 | +10.05 |
| Parallel L1 aggregation (per-chunk TLS) | architectural | l1_aggregation | DITCH | +8.50 | +7.15 |
| 12 other ideas | — | — | DITCH/ERR | various | various |

† Not reproduced on replication run.

**Merge Shortlist (complete list):**

1. **Bundle (defer-rotation + octant + hunger-gated) — merge as a unit.** −1.81 ms wall (2.7× noise). Prerequisite: run the trophic canary (apex/grazer counts within ±20% at 1M). The three patches are entangled by a `rot.radians` coherence contract — cherry-picking any one alone requires auditing the octant call site. Hunger-gated avoidance drives the steering gain; the sated cohort is thin at bench, so the real-gameplay win (once a feeding loop lands) will be larger.

**What to do after merging:**
- Land the feeding loop — hunger-gated avoidance individually showed −4.33 ms (DEFER due to noise); with a real energy cycle it likely clears the KEEP gate on its own.
- Fix the two FOV atan2 call-sites in `update_perception_system` to use dot/cross-product with `cos_radians`/`sin_radians`; that closes the gap that keeps `defer-rotation-radians` from hitting wall and makes the atan2 family additive.
- Fix the `!Sync` SyncPtr issue in `merge-cellslot-grid-cache-locality` and retry — the architecture idea is sound."}</result>
